decisions.briefing: Today is a neutral day with NASDAQ -0.3% and S&P 500 barely positive at +0.1% — not the risk-on signal needed to deploy capital. Cash sits at $577.14, only modestly above the $500 threshold. Strategy memory is explicit: hold through neutral days and wait for a genuine risk-on setup (NASDAQ +2%+) before filling open slots. RGC is the lone score-100 candidate with all four confirmation signals and is the top priority for the next risk-on day.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities split on July 1 as tech-heavy NASDAQ slipped 0.3% while the broader S&P 500 managed a thin 0.1% gain, a pattern suggesting mild rotation out of growth names into defensive or value sectors. Quarter-end rebalancing flows often create this divergence as institutional investors trim high-momentum winners and rotate proceeds into laggards. Without a clear catalyst — no major Fed commentary or macro surprise — the session was largely directionless, consistent with post-quarter positioning noise rather than a meaningful trend shift.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於7月1日出現分歧走勢，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數下跌0.3%，而標普500指數僅微升0.1%，顯示市場存在輕微從成長股輪動至防禦或價值股的跡象。季末再平衡資金流往往造成這種背離，機構投資者通常會修剪強勢股並將資金轉入表現落後的板塊。由於缺乏明確催化劑——聯儲局未有重大發言，亦無宏觀數據衝擊——整體市場方向不明，符合季末倉位調整的特性，而非趨勢性轉變。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to cash or liquid assets held in reserve, ready to be deployed when the right opportunity arises. Keeping dry powder is a deliberate strategy — by not forcing trades on low-conviction days, an investor preserves the ability to buy aggressively when high-conviction setups appear. Today's decision to hold $577 in cash rather than buy on a flat market is a textbook example of maintaining dry powder.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）是指持有備用現金或流動資產，以便在合適機會出現時迅速部署。保留乾火藥是一種主動策略——在低確信度的日子不強行入市，投資者就能在高確信度的買入機會出現時全力出擊。今天選擇持有577美元現金而非在平淡市況中買入，正是保留乾火藥的典型體現。
